descriptions: Carlo Gambino formed an alliance with the Spatola clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Carlo Gambino created an alliance between the Gambino family and three Sicilian clans: the Inzerillos, the Spatolas and the Di Maggios.

descriptions: La Anti Unión Tepito is a splinter group from Unión Tepito, in conflict with it.
edges.evidence_quote: disputas internas que derivaron en escisiones como La Anti Unión Tepito

14K.description: The 14K is a triad group based in Hong Kong but active internationally. It is the second largest triad group in the world with around 20,000 members split into thirty subgroups. Formed in 1945 by Kuomintang Lieutenant-General Kot Siu-wong in Guangzhou, China, as an anti-Communist action group, it relocated to Hong Kong in 1949. The group is heavily involved in drug trafficking, illegal gambling, money laundering, and other criminal activities.

descriptions: 14K-Hau is a subgroup of 14K operating in South Africa.
edges.evidence_quote: Two 14K groups, 14K-Hau and 14K-Ngai, are among seven Chinese criminal organizations operating in South Africa

descriptions: 14K-Ngai is a subgroup of 14K operating in South Africa.
edges.evidence_quote: Two 14K groups, 14K-Hau and 14K-Ngai, are among seven Chinese criminal organizations operating in South Africa

descriptions: 14K cooperates with Abu Sayyaf in arms smuggling and money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: The 14K triad has been involved in smuggling arms to Abu Sayyaf and has reportedly cooperated with the Islamic group in laundering and transmitting ransom money, taking a percentage of the ransoms in exchange for their assistance.

descriptions: Ah Kong is listed as a rival of 14K in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Ah Kong , Big Circle Gang , Sun Yee On , Wo On Lok , Wo Shing Wo

descriptions: Big Circle Gang is a rival of 14K in Australia.
edges.evidence_quote: Their rivals were Wo Shing Wo, Lo San, Big Circle and Sun Yee On.

descriptions: 14K sells pseudoephedrine to Head Hunters.
edges.evidence_quote: They are involved in the importation of pseudoephedrine , a chemical precursor in the illicit manufacture of methamphetamine, from Hong Kong and mainland China, which they sell to local drug trafficking gangs, the Head Hunters and the Hells Angels .

descriptions: 14K sells pseudoephedrine to Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: They are involved in the importation of pseudoephedrine , a chemical precursor in the illicit manufacture of methamphetamine, from Hong Kong and mainland China, which they sell to local drug trafficking gangs, the Head Hunters and the Hells Angels .

descriptions: Lo San is a rival of 14K in Australia.
edges.evidence_quote: Their rivals were Wo Shing Wo, Lo San, Big Circle and Sun Yee On.

descriptions: 14K has connections to Ping On leadership.
edges.evidence_quote: The 14K has had connections to the leadership of the Ping On triad in Boston and Wah Ching in San Francisco.

descriptions: 14K is a component of the Sam Gor syndicate.
edges.evidence_quote: The Sam Gor syndicate is composed of 14K and other Triads and has Canadian roots in and leadership from the Big Circle Boys.

descriptions: Wo On Lok is listed as a rival of 14K in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Ah Kong , Big Circle Gang , Sun Yee On , Wo On Lok , Wo Shing Wo

descriptions: Shui Fong Triad challenged 14K in Macau in 1997.
edges.evidence_quote: Under Wan Kuok-koi (nicknamed "Broken Tooth Koi", 崩牙駒 ), the 14K was being challenged by the smaller Shui Fong Triad.

descriptions: 14K supplies raw materials for methamphetamine to the Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Intelligence reports from the Attorney General of Mexico and the Philippine Drug Enforcement Agency have indicated that the 14K triad is among the suppliers of raw materials used in the manufacturing of methamphetamine to the Sinaloa Cartel.

descriptions: 14K and Sun Yee On are rivals, with 14K being the second largest triad.
edges.evidence_quote: They are the main rival of the Sun Yee On , which is the largest triad.

descriptions: Tiny Rascal Gang is listed as an ally of 14K in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Ping On , Snakeheads , Wah Ching , Tiny Rascal Gang

descriptions: 14K has connections to Wah Ching.
edges.evidence_quote: The 14K has had connections to the leadership of the Ping On triad in Boston and Wah Ching in San Francisco.

descriptions: 14K and Wo Shing Wo are rivals in Ireland and UK, involved in turf wars.
edges.evidence_quote: The reported criminal activities of the triads included the trafficking of women and children from China into Ireland, involvement in casinos, and money laundering. Gardaí also reported a great deal of interaction between the Chinese gangs operating in Ireland and Scotland.

descriptions: 14K is listed as an ally of Abu Sayyaf in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 14K, Maute Group, Al-Qaeda (formerly)

descriptions: Abu Sayyaf coordinated with 14K Triad for kidnappings and received military support from them.
edges.evidence_quote: Abu Sayyaf coordinated with the Chinese 14K Triad gang in carrying out the kidnappings. The 14K Triad has militarily supported Abu Sayyaf.

descriptions: Ah Kong and 14K are listed as rivals in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 14K

descriptions: Ah Kong clashed with and defeated 14K after a disrespect incident.
edges.evidence_quote: There was an occasion when Siam-kia was disrespected by the 14K boss known as Ngau Si. A clash between the two gangs erupted. Ah Kong defeated 14K

descriptions: Big Circle Gang lists 14K Triad as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 14K Triad, Bloods, Piru Street Boys, Crips, East Side Longos, 211 Crew, Soldiers of Aryan Culture, Aryan Circle, Aryan Brotherhood, Nazi Lowriders, Aryan Nations, Lynwood Vikings

descriptions: 14k Triad is listed as an ally of the Black Dragons in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wah Ching , Vietnamese Boyz Gang, Oriental Lazy Boyz , Asian Boyz , Hop Sing Tong, United Bamboo Triad, 14k Triad

descriptions: 14K is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Independent Soldiers , Musitano crime family , Rizzuto crime family , 14K (triad) , Hells Angels

descriptions: Ping On and 14K Triad are listed as allies in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 14K , Hung Mong

descriptions: Ping On served as a recruitment and training ground for 14K Triad.
edges.evidence_quote: The Ping On was regarded as a 'farm team' for the 14K triad in Hong Kong.

descriptions: 14K is a constituent triad of Sam Gor.
edges.evidence_quote: Sam Gor is made up of 14K, Wo Shing Wo, Sun Yee On, Big Circle Gang and Bamboo Union.

descriptions: Shui Fong and 14K were engaged in a gang war in Macau in the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: They were involved in a high-profile gang war with perennial rivals the 14K, led in Macau by 'Broken Tooth Koi' during this period.

descriptions: The infobox lists 14K as a rival of Shui Fong.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 14K, Wo Shing Wo

descriptions: Sinaloa Cartel allies with 14K Triad to acquire precursor chemicals.
edges.evidence_quote: The Sinaloa Federation has also formed alliances with two powerful Chinese triads , Sun Yee On and the 14K Triad , to acquire the precursor chemicals needed in creating highly-addictive synthetic drugs like methamphetamine, and now, likely fentanyl.

descriptions: Sun Yee On competes with 14K in the fictional setting of Black Lagoon.
edges.evidence_quote: In the anime adaptation of Black Lagoon, the Thai branch of Sun Yee On, led by a man named Wan, is based in the fictional city of Roanapur and competes with the other organised crime syndicates in the city like the 14K.

descriptions: TRG formed alliances with 14K.
edges.evidence_quote: They have formed alliances with Chinese organizations such as the 14K , Wah Ching and Wo Hop To in California and the New York City -based Ghost Shadows .

descriptions: Wah Ching has strong associations with 14K triad.
edges.evidence_quote: There is law enforcement anecdotal evidence that suggests as a group the gang has developed strong associations with other Asian organized crime groups, such as the 14K and Sun Yee On triads in Hong Kong.

descriptions: Wo Shing Wo and 14K are rivals in Ireland.
edges.evidence_quote: the activities of the Wo Shing Wo and their rival 14K

descriptions: Wo Shing Wo battled 14K for heroin trade control in Amsterdam in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 1970s, the group battled the 14K and Ah Kong for control of the heroin trade in Amsterdam.

descriptions: Wo Shing Wo attacked 14K members in Glasgow in 2003.
edges.evidence_quote: Wo Shing Wo footsoldiers ambushed 14K members in a machete attack on Glasgow's Sauchiehall Street in July 2003

descriptions: Lashkar-e-Jhangvi is a non-state ally of the Taliban.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies ... Lashkar-e-Jhangvi

descriptions: A faction of Lashkar-e-Jhangvi merged with TTP in 2020.
edges.evidence_quote: the Amjad Farouqi group, one faction of the Lashkar-e-Jhangvi, ... merged with TTP

descriptions: One faction of Lashkar-e-Jhangvi merged with TTP in 2020.
edges.evidence_quote: Between July and November 2020, the Amjad Farouqi group, one faction of the Lashkar-e-Jhangvi, the Musa Shaheed Karwan group, Mehsud factions of the TTP, Mohmand Taliban, Bajaur Taliban, Jamaat-ul-Ahrar, and Hizb-ul-Ahrar merged with TTP.

descriptions: The Batti clan was involved in a bloody feud with the Calabrian drug traffickers led by Franco Coco Trovato.
edges.evidence_quote: Coinvolti poi in una sanguinosa faida con i narcotrafficanti calabresi, comandati dal boss Franco Coco Trovato

descriptions: The Batti clan is considered the longa manus (extended arm) of the Fabbrocino clan, acting on their behalf.
edges.evidence_quote: La famiglia Batti di San Giuseppe Vesuviano è considerata dagli inquirenti la "longa manus" del clan Fabbrocino.

descriptions: The Antonio Giugliano clan established relationships with the Batti clan for drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: le due organizzazioni avevano instaurato rapporti con i clan Batti di San Giuseppe Vesuviano e Formicola di San Giovanni a Teduccio e con la 'ndrangheta

descriptions: The Rosario Giugliano clan also established relationships with the Batti clan for drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: le due organizzazioni avevano instaurato rapporti con i clan Batti di San Giuseppe Vesuviano e Formicola di San Giovanni a Teduccio e con la 'ndrangheta

descriptions: Nuova Sacra Corona Unita was a refounded version of Sacra Corona Unita after a split.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1986 il gruppo criminale barese capeggiato da Savinuccio Parisi e quello foggiano di Giosuè Rizzi e Pino Iannelli, risentiti con Pino Rogoli a causa delle sue esplicite ammissioni nel processo in cui erano imputati insieme a Bari, si staccarono dalla Sacra corona unita e divennero autonomi. Iniziò la rifondazione della Sacra corona unita partendo dalle modalità di affiliazione, con regole più rigide e severe. Così nel carcere di Trani nacque la Nuova Sacra corona unita (NSCU)

Al-Zein crime family.description: The Al-Zein crime family is a prominent Mhallami mafia organization primarily based in Germany, involved in drug trafficking, armed robbery, arms trafficking, assault, extortion, fraud, money laundering, kidnapping, and murder. It has an estimated membership of 15,000 individuals and operates across Europe, the Middle East, and the United States. The clan originated from the Mhallami ethnic group from the Syrian-Turkish border region, migrating to Lebanon in the 1930s and then to Germany in the 1980s.

descriptions: Al-Zein has family ties to Fakhro clan in Malmö.
edges.evidence_quote: According to the police clan report, the family-based criminal network El-Zein has family ties to the Fakhro clan in Malmö.

descriptions: Al-Zein and Miri clan are allies according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Miri-Clan

descriptions: Family Union includes members of Remmo clan, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Its members also include relatives of other large Arab families, including the Remmo clan.

descriptions: Miri clan member murdered a member of the Al-Zein crime family, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2024 a 34-year old Miri clan member murdered a men of the rival Al-Zein crime family on a public street in Stade, close to Hamburg.

descriptions: 6bop gang is a rival of The Americans.
edges.evidence_quote: The Rivals of the Americans gang include all gangs affiliated to the British gang corporate body. These include the Hard Livings , 28s street gang, Junky Funky Kids, Ghetto Kids, Nice Time Kids, The Terrible West Siders, The Fancy Boys, 6bop gang, Mongrels, Young Gifteds and Terrible Josters.

Cártel de Tepalcatepec.description: Mexican criminal organization dedicated to drug trafficking, based in Tepalcatepec, Michoacán. Founded in 2018 by Juan José Farías Álvarez alias 'El Abuelo'. Known for violent confrontations with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel (CJNG) and for using tactics such as explosive-laden drones and roadblocks. Currently operates under the protection of Carteles Unidos.

descriptions: CJNG attacked El Abuelo Cartel, leading to armed clashes.
edges.evidence_quote: The 2019 Western Michoacán clashes were a series of armed confrontations on 30 August 2019 between the Jalisco New Generation Cartel (CJNG) and the El Abuelo Cartel based in Tepalcatepec, Michoacán, Mexico.

descriptions: Cartel del Abuelo is listed as a rival of CJNG in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sinaloa Cartel , Tijuana Cartel , Santa Rosa de Lima Cartel , Los Viagras , Cárteles Unidos , Autodefensas , Nueva Plaza Cartel , Knights Templar Cartel , La Familia Michoacana , Cártel del Noreste , La Unión Tepito , Los Zetas , Zetas Vieja Escuela , Barrio Azteca (current status unknown) , Los Correa , Cartel del Abuelo , Grupo Sombra , Gente Nueva , La Nueva Familia Michoacana

descriptions: Cartel del Abuelo has advantage over CJNG in Tierra Caliente.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Viagras and the Cartel del Abuelo were reported as having a 'profound advantage' over the CJNG in Tierra Caliente.

descriptions: The two cartels are in constant clashes and disputes.
edges.evidence_quote: El Cartel de Tepalcatepec , también conocido como el Cartel del Abuelo , es una organización criminal mexicana dedicada al tráfico de drogas, conocida por sus constantes enfrentamientos y disputas con el Cartel de Jalisco Nueva Generación en la frontera de Jalisco y Michoacán.

descriptions: Cartel de Tepalcatepec joined Cárteles Unidos to fight CJNG.
edges.evidence_quote: El Cartel de Tepalcatepec antiguamente fue un grupo de autodefensas local, para luego pasar al narcotráfico , integrandosé a los Carteles Unidos para luchar contra el Cartel Jalisco Nueva Generación.

descriptions: Cártel de Tepalcatepec is a member organization of Cárteles Unidos.
edges.evidence_quote: Cárteles Unidos, conocido inicialmente como La Resistencia, es una organización criminal mexicana compuesta por miembros del Cártel de Tepalcatepec

descriptions: Los Viagras and Cartel del Abuelo are allied against Jalisco New Generation Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Viagras and the Cartel del Abuelo were reported as having a "profound advantage" over New Generation in Tierra Caliente.

descriptions: Los Viagras and Cartel del Abuelo had an advantage over CJNG together.
edges.evidence_quote: se sabe que Los Viagras y el "Cartel del Abuelo" tenían una "ventaja profunda" sobre el cártel Jalisco en Tierra Caliente.

descriptions: Stoneydown is in alliance with or subsumed into Mali Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Many smaller local gangs are in alliance or have been subsumed into the Mali Boys, such as Drive & Marlowe (DM), Boundary, Coppermill, and Stoneydown.

descriptions: CNG is listed as a rival of Os Manos in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , V7 , Os Tauras , BNC , Os Aberto , Cebolas , CNG

'Ndrina Acri.description: The 'Ndrina Acri is a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta criminal organization based in Rossano, Calabria, Italy, with operations extending to Germany. It is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and other crimes. The clan was targeted in the 'Timpone Rosso' operation in 2009, and in 2013, 28 members were arrested and assets worth €40 million were seized.

descriptions: The 'Ndrina Acri is a subordinate clan of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Acri è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese di Rossano in Provincia di Cosenza con propaggini in Germania.

descriptions: Nicola Acri, boss of the 'Ndrina Acri, is linked to the Abbruzzese clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Nicola Acri (1979, detto occhi di ghiaccio) è un criminale italiano di Rossano (CS) legato agli Abbruzzese di Cassano allo Ionio

descriptions: The Acri clan was involved in a massacre in Strongoli in conflict with the Giglio clan.
edges.evidence_quote: È stato implicato anche nella famigerata strage di Strongoli avvenuta nel 2000 in questo paese in provincia di Crotone dove furono ammazzati a colpi di kalashnikov 5 persone in contrasto con i Giglio di Strongoli.

descriptions: A member moved from VIS to SIC, indicating a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: Pantyu Pantev, a.k.a. "Polly" - Drug smuggler, initially affiliated with VIS, later with SIC.

descriptions: Hizbul Mujahideen is listed as a non-state ally of Lashkar-e-Taiba.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies Jaish-e-Mohammed, Pakistani Taliban, Hizbul Mujahideen, Harkat-ul-Jihad al-Islami, Harkat-ul-Mujahideen, Al-Badr, Al Rashid Trust, Indian Mujahideen, People’s Anti-Fascist Front, Muslim United Liberation Tigers of Assam, Al-Qaeda AQIS AGH

descriptions: LeT and Hizb-ul-Mujahideen conduct operations together.
edges.evidence_quote: The Lashkar is reported to have conducted several of its major operations in tandem with the Hizb-ul-Mujahideen.

descriptions: Al Rashid Trust is listed as a non-state ally of Lashkar-e-Taiba.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies Jaish-e-Mohammed, Pakistani Taliban, Hizbul Mujahideen, Harkat-ul-Jihad al-Islami, Harkat-ul-Mujahideen, Al-Badr, Al Rashid Trust, Indian Mujahideen, People’s Anti-Fascist Front, Muslim United Liberation Tigers of Assam, Al-Qaeda AQIS AGH

descriptions: The Farao 'ndrina is allied with the Marincola.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Farao è una potentissima cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese di Cirò e Cirò Marina , alleata con i Marincola.

descriptions: ISIS–K formed an alliance with ETIP.
edges.evidence_quote: the newly ordained ISIS–K forged significant alliances with other Sunni jihadist movements in the region to include the Islamic Movement of Uzbekistan (IMU), Islamic Movement of Turkmenistan (IMT), Uyghur East Turkestan Islamic Party (ETIP), Jamaat Ansarullah, Harakat Islami Tajikistan, and the Islamic Jihad Renaissance Party of Tajikistan (IJRPT), Hezb-e Islami Gulbuddin, and Balochi militant groups including the Pakistani Jundullah movement and Iranian Jundullah movement

descriptions: BTW is listed as an ally of Killer Beez in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Power , Crips , BTW (Bad Troublesome Ward)

descriptions: Listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bad Troublesome Ward, New Zealand Nomads , Black Power

Boko Haram.description: Boko Haram is a self-proclaimed jihadist militant group based in northeastern Nigeria, founded in 2002 by Mohammed Yusuf. It aims to establish an Islamic state and has been responsible for tens of thousands of deaths, mass abductions, and displacement of millions. The group split in 2016, with a faction becoming the Islamic State's West Africa Province. It remains active as of 2025.

descriptions: Boko Haram was a former affiliate of al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Boko Haram (pledged allegiance to and as part of ISIL from 2014 to 2015)

descriptions: AQIM, al-Shabaab, and Boko Haram attempted to coordinate activities as of June 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: According to U.S. Army General Carter Ham, Al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb, the Somalia-based Al-Shabaab, and the Nigeria-based Boko Haram were as of June 2012 attempting to synchronize and coordinate their activities in terms of sharing funds, training and explosives.

descriptions: Al-Shabaab attempted to coordinate activities with Boko Haram.
edges.evidence_quote: In June 2012, General Carter Ham of the U.S. Army said that Al-Shabaab, al-Qaeda in Islamic Maghreb (AQIM), and the Nigeria-based Boko Haram were attempting to coordinate their activities, including in funding, training, and explosives.

descriptions: Al-Mulathameen was an ally of Boko Haram in 2013.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies ... Al-Mulathameen (2013)

descriptions: Boko Haram had a relationship with al-Qaeda, but al-Qaeda never officially accepted Boko Haram as an affiliate.
edges.evidence_quote: It has long been alleged that Boko Haram had a relationship with al-Qaeda.

descriptions: Al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb was an ally of Boko Haram from 2007 to 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies ... al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb (2007–2015)

descriptions: Boko Haram maintained a relationship with AQIM for training and material support.
edges.evidence_quote: According to the UN Security Council listing of Boko Haram under the al-Qaeda sanctions regime in May 2014, the group 'has maintained a relationship with AQIM for training and material support purposes'.

descriptions: Ansar Dine was an ally of Boko Haram from 2012 to 2013.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies ... Ansar Dine (2012–2013)

descriptions: Boko Haram and Ansaru cooperated in kidnappings.
edges.evidence_quote: They were linked to a number of kidnappings, often reportedly in association with the splinter group Ansaru

descriptions: Ansaru was a group that was part of Boko Haram from 2009 to 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: Group: Ansaru (2009–2012)

descriptions: Ansaru is a faction that split from Boko Haram and is loyal to al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: These were the "West African Province" which is part of ISIL; "Jamā'at Ahl as-Sunnah lid-Da'wah wa'l-Jihād" (Boko Haram), under Shekau's control; and "Ansaru" which is loyal to al-Qaeda and rejected the caliphate of al-Bagdadi, though it shares his disapproval of the "wide-reaching interpretation of takfir" of Shekau.

descriptions: Ansaru is an offshoot of Boko Haram.
edges.evidence_quote: The U.S. State Department designated Boko Haram and its offshoot Ansaru as terrorist organisations in November 2013.

descriptions: Boko Haram and ISIL became enemies due to territorial disputes.
edges.evidence_quote: Boko Haram and ISIL were initially allies. However, the two groups became enemies due to territorial disputes, because ISIL tried to conquer the zones which were under Boko Haram's control.

descriptions: Boko Haram was formerly aligned with ISIL.
edges.evidence_quote: The group formerly aligned itself with the Islamic State of Iraq and the Levant.

descriptions: Boko Haram pledged allegiance to ISIL and became its West African province.
edges.evidence_quote: In March 2015, Shekau pledged allegiance to ISIS self-styled caliph Abu Bakr Al-Baghdadi and became "West African Province" (Wilayat Garb Ifriqiyah), i.e. the West African province of the Islamic State.

descriptions: Boko Haram pledged allegiance to ISIL, becoming a province.
edges.evidence_quote: On 7 March, Boko Haram's leader Abubakar Shekau pledged allegiance to ISIL via an audio message posted on the organisation's Twitter account.

descriptions: ISWAP emerged as a hostile faction from a split in Boko Haram in 2016.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2016, the group split, resulting in the emergence of a hostile faction known as the Islamic State's West Africa Province.

descriptions: ISWAP emerged as a hostile faction after a split from Boko Haram.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2016, the group split, resulting in the emergence of a hostile faction known as the Islamic State's West Africa Province.

descriptions: ISWAP is a hostile faction that split from Boko Haram.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2016, the group split, resulting in the emergence of a hostile faction known as the Islamic State's West Africa Province.

descriptions: Boko Haram split in 2016, creating a hostile faction called Islamic State's West Africa Province.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2016, the group split, resulting in the emergence of a hostile faction known as the Islamic State's West Africa Province.

descriptions: Boko Haram split in 2016, creating a hostile faction.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2016, the group split, resulting in the emergence of a hostile faction known as the Islamic State's West Africa Province.

edges.target: Movement for Oneness and Jihad in West Africa
descriptions: Movement for Oneness and Jihad in West Africa was an ally of Boko Haram from 2012 to 2013.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies ... Movement for Oneness and Jihad in West Africa (2012–2013)

descriptions: ISWAP split from Boko Haram.
edges.evidence_quote: It emerged in 2015 after a split from Boko Haram.

descriptions: Ajnad al-Sham Islamic Union is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Ajnad al-Sham Islamic Union

descriptions: Ajnad al-Sham Islamic Union is listed as an opponent of Islamic State.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Ajnad al-Sham Islamic Union

descriptions: Many early Al-Shabaab leaders previously belonged to al-Ittihad al-Islamiya.
edges.evidence_quote: Many of its early leaders and members previously belonged not only to the Islamic Courts Union but also to the older al-Ittihad al-Islamiya

descriptions: Islamic State originated from Jaish al-Ta'ifa al-Mansurah.
edges.evidence_quote: Originating in the Jaish al-Ta'ifa al-Mansurah founded by Abu Omar al-Baghdadi in 2004

descriptions: The Islamic State originated from Jaish al-Ta'ifa al-Mansurah, which was its predecessor.
edges.evidence_quote: Originating in the Jaish al-Ta'ifa al-Mansurah founded by Abu Omar al-Baghdadi in 2004, the organisation (primarily under the Islamic State of Iraq name) affiliated itself with al-Qaeda in Iraq and fought alongside them during the 2003–2006 phase of the Iraqi insurgency.

descriptions: Houssine Ait Soussan was allied with the Bouyakhrichan organisation.
edges.evidence_quote: he was also allied with the Bouyakhrichan organisation.

descriptions: Bouyakhrichan organisation is suspected of assassinating Abdelhadi Yaqout, cousin of Noffel clan leader.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bouyakhrichan organisation are the main suspects of this assassination.

descriptions: Noffel's organisation allegedly orchestrated the assassination of Samir Bouyakhrichan.
edges.evidence_quote: The assassination was allegedly orchestrated by "Noffel"'s organisation.

descriptions: Samir Bouyakhrichan was a rival of the Taghi organisation.
edges.evidence_quote: Samir Bouyakhrichan was a known rival of the Taghi organisation

Devil's Disciples Motorcycle Club (Canad.description: Canadian outlaw motorcycle club based in Greater Montreal, founded in late 1965. It was briefly the most powerful motorcycle gang in Montreal before disbanding in January 1976 after a biker war with the Popeyes. The club engaged in drug trafficking, intimidation, assault, and murder, and was known for its assassination attempt on singer Johnny Hallyday.

descriptions: The two clubs had a close friendship.
edges.evidence_quote: the Canadian and Boston groups maintained a close friendship with one another

descriptions: Devil's Disciples had a longstanding feud with Dubois Brothers over drug trade.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang had a longstanding feud with the infamous Dubois Brothers

descriptions: Devil's Disciples fought a turf war with Popeyes from 1968 to 1970, and later conflict continued.
edges.evidence_quote: disbanding in January 1976 as a result of a biker war with the Popeyes

descriptions: Devil's Disciples were allied with Satan's Choice in war against Popeyes.
edges.evidence_quote: the Devil's Disciples were also participants in the notable gang war between Satan's Choice and the Popeye Moto Club

descriptions: Dark Circle, founded by ex-Devil's Disciples, was Rock Machine's death squad.
edges.evidence_quote: The Dark Circle has often been described as Rock Machine's death squad

descriptions: Satan's Choice allied with Devil's Disciples against Popeyes.
edges.evidence_quote: aligning themselves with the Devil's Disciples

descriptions: Sundowners MC listed as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Satan's Choice MC , Sundowners MC , Devil's Disciples MC (Boston, USA)

descriptions: Dubois Brothers fought Devil's Disciples for control of drug territory, hiring Popeyes to attack them.
edges.evidence_quote: Claude Dubois considered this as a threat and intrusion into his and his Brothers territory and hired another muscle group of bikers called the Popeyes Motorcycle Club led by Yves Buteau.

descriptions: The Popeyes fought a turf war with the Devil's Disciples from 1968 to 1970.
edges.evidence_quote: From 1968 up until 1970, a short but violent turf war for control of the drug trade went between the Popeyes and Devil's Disciples MC

descriptions: Devil's Disciples is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Outlaws, Satan's Choice, Devil's Disciples

descriptions: Popeyes killed 15 Devil's Disciples members, leading to their disbandment.
edges.evidence_quote: The Popeyes, who acted as 'muscle' for the Dubois brothers, killed 15 members of the Devil's Disciples between 1974 and 1976, causing the latter gang to disband themselves in January 1976.

descriptions: Devils Disciples former members joined the Alliance alongside Rock Machine.
edges.evidence_quote: former members of the Devils Disciples , resisted the Hells Angels' attempts at monopolisation and established a coalition known as the 'Alliance to fight the Angels'.

descriptions: Devil's Disciples listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Outlaws MC (1974–1977), Hells Angels MC (1996–2000), Devil's Disciples MC

descriptions: Devil's Disciples were allies of Satan's Choice.
edges.evidence_quote: The Popeyes had targeted the Devil's Disciples biker gang, who were allies of Satan's Choice.
